rawAssistant: I'm Corin, a trainer in Hollowfen. Don't waste my time with small talk; what can I do for you? You're not here to discuss the finer points of training, are you? I've got a reputation to uphold. My team's been waiting for results from this north road, and I won't let anyone get in my way – especially not some amateur like you. What brings you out here today?
